description: Short-term crypto scalping strategy. Only trades when the market is oscillating around VWAP rather than trending strongly in one direction. Stocks, commodities and forex are handled by the Ironclad strategy.

market_environment_filter.description: Skip if the last 10 candles are ALL above or ALL below EMA8 — this indicates a strong trend where scalping is dangerous
market_environment_filter.action_when_trending: Skip — defer to Ironclad strategy which is designed for trending markets

long_entry.description: Price is above VWAP — buyers in control for the session

short_entry.description: Price is below VWAP — sellers in control

avoidance_rules: Do not trade if price is more than 2.0% away from VWAP — overextended
Do not trade if last 10 candles are all on one side of EMA8 — strongly trending
Do not trade stocks, commodities or forex — use Ironclad for those

risk.note: Designed for fast ranging crypto markets. Performs poorly in strong trends.

strategy_comparison.use_this_when: Market is choppy, oscillating, ranging — RSI3 cycling between extremes
strategy_comparison.use_ironclad_when: Market has a clear daily trend — use for stocks, commodities, forex and trending crypto
